modules.name: 自动拾取 V10.0 (无聚宝术精简稳定版)
modules.code: (function(){(function preventLayaSleep() { if (typeof Laya === 'undefined') return; Object.defineProperty(document, 'hidden', { get: function() { return false; } }); Object.defineProperty(document, 'visibilityState', { get: function() { return 'visible'; } }); if (Laya.stage) { Laya.stage.onVisibilityChange = function() { }; Laya.stage.onBlur = function() { }; } if (Laya.timer) Object.defineProperty(Laya.timer, 'scale', { get: function() { return 1; }, set: function() { } }); window.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function(e) { e.stopPropagation(); }, true); })(); let _ROLE_KEY = null; let _GOODS_LIST_KEY = null; function findSymbolKey(obj, description) { if (!obj) return null; let symbols = Object.getOwnPropertySymbols(obj); for (let sym of symbols) { if (sym.description === description) return sym; } return null; } function getRole(gamePanel) { if (!gamePanel) return null; if (!_ROLE_KEY) { _ROLE_KEY = findSymbolKey(gamePanel, 'role'); } if (_ROLE_KEY) return gamePanel[_ROLE_KEY]; if (gamePanel.role) return gamePanel.role; return null; } function getGoodsList(collectService) { if (!collectService) return null; if (!_GOODS_LIST_KEY) { _GOODS_LIST_KEY = findSymbolKey(collectService, 'goodsList'); } if (_GOODS_LIST_KEY) return collectService[_GOODS_LIST_KEY]; if (collectService.goodsList) return collectService.goodsList; return null; } let _lootCachedPanel = null; function getGamePanel() { if (_lootCachedPanel && !_lootCachedPanel.destroyed && _lootCachedPanel.parent) return _lootCachedPanel; if (!window.Laya || !window.Laya.stage) return null; let stack = [window.Laya.stage]; while (stack.length > 0) { let node = stack.pop(); if (node && node.joyStick && typeof node.jiesuanEnd !== 'undefined') { let role = getRole(node); if (role) { _ROLE_KEY = findSymbolKey(node, 'role') || null; _lootCachedPanel = node; return _lootCachedPanel; } } if (node && node._children && node._children.length > 0) { for (let i = 0; i < node._children.length; i++) stack.push(node._children[i]); } } return null; } function pressOriginalKey(joyStick, keyCode) { if (joyStick && joyStick.onKeyDown) joyStick.onKeyDown({ keyCode: keyCode }); } function releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, keyCode) { if (joyStick && joyStick.onKeyUp) joyStick.onKeyUp({ keyCode: keyCode }); } const _lootDirState = { up: false, down: false, left: false, right: false }; function releaseAllDirs(joyStick, conf) { if (!joyStick || !conf) return; if (_lootDirState.up) { releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyUp); _lootDirState.up = false; } if (_lootDirState.down) { releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyDown); _lootDirState.down = false; } if (_lootDirState.left) { releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyLeft); _lootDirState.left = false; } if (_lootDirState.right) { releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyRight); _lootDirState.right = false; } } function applyDirs(joyStick, conf, needUp, needDown, needLeft, needRight) { if (needUp !== _lootDirState.up) { if (needUp) pressOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyUp); else releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyUp); _lootDirState.up = needUp; } if (needDown !== _lootDirState.down) { if (needDown) pressOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyDown); else releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyDown); _lootDirState.down = needDown; } if (needLeft !== _lootDirState.left) { if (needLeft) pressOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyLeft); else releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyLeft); _lootDirState.left = needLeft; } if (needRight !== _lootDirState.right) { if (needRight) pressOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyRight); else releaseOriginalKey(joyStick, conf.keyRight); _lootDirState.right = needRight; } } const workerCode = ` let timer = null; self.onmessage = function(e) { if (e.data === 'start') { if (timer) clearInterval(timer); timer = setInterval(() => self.postMessage('tick'), 33); } else if (e.data === 'stop') { clearInterval(timer); timer = null; } }; `; const bgWorker = new Worker(URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([workerCode], { type: 'application/javascript' }))); function createLootIndicator() { if (document.getElementById('_lootIndicator')) return; const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.id = '_lootIndicator'; wrap.style.cssText = ` position: fixed; top: 12px; left: 12px; z-index: 99999; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.65); border: 3px solid #FF1744; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,23,68,0.5); cursor: pointer; user-select: none; transition: border-color 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; `; wrap.innerHTML = ` <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"> <path d="M18 11V6a2 2 0 0 0-4 0v1"/> <path d="M14 10V4a2 2 0 0 0-4 0v2"/> <path d="M10 10.5V6a2 2 0 0 0-4 0v8"/> <path d="M18 8a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v6a8 8 0 0 1-8 8h-2c-2.5 0-4.5-1-6.2-2.8L3 16.4a2 2 0 0 1 2.8-2.8L7 15"/> </svg> `; wrap.addEventListener('click', function() { toggleLoot(); }); document.body.appendChild(wrap); } function updateLootIndicator(isRunning) { const el = document.getElementById('_lootIndicator'); if (!el) return; if (isRunning) { el.style.borderColor = '#00E676'; el.style.boxShadow = '0 0 8px rgba(0,230,118,0.5)'; } else { el.style.borderColor = '#FF1744'; el.style.boxShadow = '0 0 8px rgba(255,23,68,0.5)'; } } window._AutoLootV10 = { isRunning: false, hasTriggeredEnd: false, lastX: 0, lastY: 0, stuckTicks: 0, jiggleTicks: 0, emptyScanTicks: 0, maxHighs: 0, maxLows: 0, highReported: false, allReported: false, reset: function() { this.hasTriggeredEnd = false; this.lastX = 0; this.lastY = 0; this.stuckTicks = 0; this.jiggleTicks = 0; this.emptyScanTicks = 0; this.maxHighs = 0; this.maxLows = 0; this.highReported = false; this.allReported = false; } }; bgWorker.onmessage = function(e) { if (e.data === 'tick') autoLootLogic(); }; const LOOT_TYPE_LOW = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 11, 12, 13]; const LOOT_TYPE_EXCLUDE = [6, 8, 9, 10]; function autoLootLogic() { const sys = window._AutoLootV10; const gamePanel = getGamePanel(); if (!gamePanel) { if (_lootCachedPanel && _lootCachedPanel.joyStick) { let oldRole = getRole(_lootCachedPanel); if (oldRole) releaseAllDirs(_lootCachedPanel.joyStick, oldRole.gameConfig); } sys.reset(); return; } const myRole = getRole(gamePanel); const joyStick = gamePanel.joyStick; if (!myRole || !joyStick) { sys.reset(); return; } const conf = myRole.gameConfig; if (gamePanel.jiesuanEnd === true) sys.hasTriggeredEnd = true; if (!sys.hasTriggeredEnd) return; const myX = myRole.x + 13; const myY = myRole.y + 13; let highs = [], lows = []; let goodsList = getGoodsList(gamePanel.collectService); if (goodsList) { goodsList.forEach(node => { if (node && node.parent && !node.destroyed) { let type = node.type || (node.goodsInfo && node.goodsInfo.type); if (LOOT_TYPE_EXCLUDE.includes(type)) return; node._dist = Math.hypot((node.x + (node.width || 20) / 2) - myX, (node.y + (node.height || 20) / 2) - myY); if (LOOT_TYPE_LOW.includes(type)) lows.push(node); else highs.push(node); } }); } if (highs.length > sys.maxHighs) sys.maxHighs = highs.length; if (lows.length > sys.maxLows) sys.maxLows = lows.length; let highPicked = sys.maxHighs - highs.length; let lowPicked = sys.maxLows - lows.length; if (highs.length === 0 && sys.maxHighs > 0 && !sys.highReported) { console.log(`%c📦 [阶段战报] 极品道具/钥匙/卡片已清空 (共 ${sys.maxHighs} 个) -> 开始收尾金币...`, "color: #00BFFF; font-weight: bold;"); sys.highReported = true; } if (highs.length === 0 && lows.length === 0) { releaseAllDirs(joyStick, conf); sys.emptyScanTicks++; if (sys.emptyScanTicks > 60) { if ((sys.maxHighs > 0 || sys.maxLows > 0) && !sys.allReported) { console.log(`%c✨ [全图扫荡完毕] 二次复勘确认地图干净！\n💎 极品: ${highPicked} / ${sys.maxHighs} 个\n💰 资源: ${lowPicked} / ${sys.maxLows} 个`, "color: #00FF00; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; background: #222; padding: 4px; border: 1px solid #00FF00;"); sys.allReported = true; } } return; } else { sys.emptyScanTicks = 0; } highs.sort((a, b) => a._dist - b._dist); lows.sort((a, b) => a._dist - b._dist); let target = highs.length > 0 ? highs[0] : lows[0]; if (!target) return; if (Math.hypot(myX - sys.lastX, myY - sys.lastY) < 1.0) { sys.stuckTicks++; } else { sys.stuckTicks = 0; } sys.lastX = myX; sys.lastY = myY; if (sys.stuckTicks > 15) { sys.jiggleTicks = 10; sys.stuckTicks = 0; } if (sys.jiggleTicks > 0) { sys.jiggleTicks--; let randomDir = Math.random() > 0.5; applyDirs(joyStick, conf, randomDir, !randomDir, !randomDir, randomDir); return; } const tx = target.x + (target.width || 20) / 2; const ty = target.y + (target.height || 20) / 2; const tolerance = 5; let needUp = false, needDown = false, needLeft = false, needRight = false; if (myX < tx - tolerance) needRight = true; if (myX > tx + tolerance) needLeft = true; if (myY < ty - tolerance) needDown = true; if (myY > ty + tolerance) needUp = true; applyDirs(joyStick, conf, needUp, needDown, needLeft, needRight); } function toggleLoot() { const sys = window._AutoLootV10; sys.isRunning = !sys.isRunning; if (sys.isRunning) { bgWorker.postMessage('start'); updateLootIndicator(true); console.log("%c[AutoLoot V10.0] 🟢 ON — 无聚宝术精简稳定版", "color:#0f0;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;"); } else { bgWorker.postMessage('stop'); const gp = getGamePanel(); if (gp) { let role = getRole(gp); if (gp.joyStick && role) releaseAllDirs(gp.joyStick, role.gameConfig); } sys.reset(); updateLootIndicator(false); console.log("%c[AutoLoot V10.0] 🔴 OFF", "color:red;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;"); } } if (window._autoLootV10KeyHandler) document.removeEventListener('keydown', window._autoLootV10KeyHandler); window._autoLootV10KeyHandler = function(e) { if (!e.isTrusted) return; if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') return; if (e.keyCode === 90) toggleLoot(); }; document.addEventListener('keydown', window._autoLootV10KeyHandler); createLootIndicator(); updateLootIndicator(false); console.log("%c✔️ [自动拾取 V10.0 无聚宝术精简稳定版] 注入成功！🔴 默认关闭", "color:white;background:#1565C0;font-size:16px;font-weight:bold;padding:8px;border-radius:4px;border:2px solid #00E5FF;"); console.log("🎮 Z键/点击抓手切换 | Symbol键兼容 | 无聚宝术 | 双轴自由移动 | Web Worker定时 | 脱困抖动");})();
